---
title: "Notes: Session 5: Regression II"
format: html
---

::: callout-note
TODO
:::

Goal: Deepen linear regression and surface modeling tensions.

You are not just teaching “more regression.”
You are teaching: How modeling goals shape methodological choices (or how they interact).


Close with a framing slide:
- Analytics is not one method. It is a toolbox shaped by goals.
Then summarize:
- Regression for understanding
- Regression for prediction
- Logistic regression as bridge to ML
And preview:
- Next: more complex machine learning models.
